# ZUUZ — Agentic AI Execution Layer for Enterprise
# https://www.zuuz.ai
ZUUZ automates enterprise approvals, procurement, compliance using AI agents.
Connects SAP, Oracle, M365, Salesforce, Zoho and 200+ systems.
Products: Persona Copilots, ApprovalOps, Execution Flows, Evidence Search.
Customers: Western International Group, Nesto Group, RA Technologies, Cloud Box.
HQ: Sunnyvale CA. Email: info@zuuz.ai
